name: Sleight
flavor: The first thing any performer learns: the hand is quicker than the eye, and the eye is quicker than the brain.
description: You perform a small feat of stage magic within range. You can produce a trivial effect: palm or vanish an object small enough to hide in one hand, make a coin walk across your knuckles and reappear anywhere within range, light or snuff a candle, chill or warm a mouthful of food, soil or clean an object, or create a harmless sensory flourish such as a puff of coloured smoke, a burst of confetti, or a single sour note from nowhere. The effect ends when you dismiss it, when you cast this trick again, or after 1 hour. It can never deal damage, and it can never move a creature or anything a creature is holding.
sheetSummary: Action, 10 ft. Trivial stage-magic effect: vanish/palm a hand-sized object, move a coin, light or snuff a flame, clean or soil, minor sensory flourish. Up to 1 hour. No damage. Cannot affect creatures or held items.
